candidates.why: Best match for direct product/service cost and the only clear cost-of-sales style line.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead/personnel cost component above operating profit.

candidates.why: Amortization supplemental disclosure; excluded from SG&A per rules excluding amortization.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present, so selected the best overhead components above operating profit. Excluded totals, balancing rows, COGS, and depreciation/amortization.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not a dedicated current-period R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.why: Balancing row on balance sheet, not expense.
